title: pelargonium × abbreviatum
intro: Pelargonium × abbreviatum, also known as the dwarf mountain geranium or dwarf Pelargonium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, bred from the Geranium species. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, sore throats, and respiratory problems. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × abbreviatum include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties, which help alleviate symptoms such as fever, cough, and cold. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × abbreviatum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to soothe irritated throats and calm digestive discomfort.
